title: Engie Gaga - Stupid face
description:
MP3: http://www.mediafire.com/?daxy41jh4ttb04a
Remake of my Stupid Face song.
Sorry for the lack of Autotune. I tried using Melodyne, but I couldn't get anything good out of it.

LYRICS(Since someone asked for them):
Spy sappin' my sentry
It just ain't right (Nope)
Spy sappin' my dispenser
Damnit damnit damnit damnit!
Spy sappin' my teleporter
Now I've seen everything
Dagit nagit, nabit dagit!
Come on, fellas!

No, no no heck no, no no no no heck no
Boys it's a Spy! That Pyro is a Spy! (Huh?)
No, no no heck no, no no no no heck no
Spy around here! That spy ain't our side! (I think not!)

Sentry down, sentry down
That dumb look right off your stupid face
Ehee, yeeeehaaaaw!
Sentry down, sentry down
That dumb look right off your stupid face
Ehee, yeeeehaaaaw!
Se-se-sentry goin'up se-sentry goin'up
Se-se-sentry goin'up se-sentry goin'up

You can always tell a texan
But you can't tell him much (Yeah!)
That's from yours truly son!
Tagged ya! Gotcha! On me, doc!
This point ain't gonna cap itself! Get over here! (Move 'em out!)
Somebody wanna wrassle up a teleporter right here?

No, no no heck no, no no no no heck no
Boys it's a Spy! That Pyro is a Spy! (No!)
No, no no heck no, no no no no heck no
Spy around here! That spy ain't our side! (Gentlemen?)

Sentry down, sentry down
That dumb look right off your stupid face
Ehee, yeeeehaaaaw!
Sentry down, sentry down
That dumb look right off your stupid face
Ehee, yeeeehaaaaw!
Se-se-sentry goin'up se-sentry goin'up
Se-se-sentry goin'up se-sentry goin'up

Didn't your mama teach ya not to play with matches?
Ya'll gotta run a lot faster than that.
I wish ya'll could see how bad I'm kicking your tail.
I'm gonna tear you down!

Sentry down, sentry down
That dumb look right off your stupid face
Ehee, yeeeehaaaaw!
Sentry down, sentry down
That dumb look right off your stupid face
Ehee, yeeeehaaaaw!
Sentry down, sentry down
That dumb look right off your stupid face
Ehee, yeeeehaaaaw!

Ehee, yeeeehaaaaw!
Se-se-sentry goin'up se-sentry goin'up
Se-se-sentry goin'up se-sentry goin'up

Whoooooohoo! Cream gravy.
